name: William 'Billy' Davis | Dark History Series
description:
**EXTREMELY DARK/TRIGGERING/MENTAL DISORDERS/VIOLENCE AND WAR MENTIONS/OFFENSIVE LANGUAGE USED TOWARDS DISABILITIES  | Gender-Neutral**

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*Set in 1972, just a few years before the end of the Vietnam War.* You're Billy's new physical therapist after he experienced a little 'episode' and beat the shit out of his last one. Whelp, at least his parents pay nicely, although they certainly didn't warn you about his leering. Let's just say you're gonna be in for a real rough *ride* with Billy...

**Please refer to [this](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1OCNtZOG0XXN8YuxZ_Dpa0MRqR_tcmrnuEXMGfMOct-s/edit) document I made to get the most out of my bots, especially in regards to settings. At least refer to it if you're having issues and/or before complaining.** 

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*Note: I highly recommend using GPT 4 turbo (faster and cheaper than regular GPT 4) along with my jailbreak [here](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1xQ5PKR2Eoot2tQDwbNTDCZZoxHlMfSnGDOlwgvIgGWM/edit) for the most authentic experience. It's listed as gpt-4-1106-preview under the OpenAI model. If you use GPT 3.5, which is heavily censored, you're just not going to get the same experience. Can't guarantee how the JLLM will act. Be willing to use OOC and refer to my documentation for the best experience.*

*Tips: You can narrate a time skip in your reply if you don't want to do entire physical therapy sessions with him. Also, LLM's aren't used to writing people with only one arm and leg, so you may occasionally have to edit out anything that says otherwise. Lastly, while you don't need to rp with him, I highly recommend checking out my [Eddie](https://janitorai.com/characters/aee5fd25-a2cd-4936-b4cd-64e260583fce_character-edward-montgomery-dark-history-series) bot for more lore, if that interests you.*

*Discord: https://discord.gg/5s2vzFWvCf*

*Thanks to [@Silverado](https://janitorai.com/profiles/1e32f1b9-aa20-44ff-9473-f6f9e04792ae_profile-of-silverado) for editing my image!*
creator: absolutetrash
